streetName.description: The street name of the address.

streetNumber.description: The street number of the address.

zipCode.description: The zip code of the address.

countryId.description: The CountryId of the country associated with the address.

domainId.description: The unique identifier for a domain.

userEmail.description: The email address of the user for which we are enabling MFA.

issuer.description:
The issuer of the authentication request.
            
An issuer is a string value that identifies the owner of the key used for the authentication request.

key.description:
The key used for the authentication request.
            
The key is a string value that is used to generate the one-time password.

users.description: collection of API.Core.Domain.Dto.User.CreateUserDto instances representing multiple users.

inviteIds.description: The Ids of the invites to send/resend.

isAvailable.description: Indicates whether the redirect to root functionality is available for the funnel.

customDomain.description:
Gets or sets the custom domain associated with the redirect configuration.
This is the custom domain assigned to the funnel by the user.

conflictingFunnelId.description:
Gets or sets the unique identifier of the funnel that is conflicting with
the current redirect operation.

conflictingFunnelName.description: Gets or sets the name of the conflicting funnel associated with the redirection.

cookies.description: The list of cookies for a category. It may be null if there are no cookies for this category.

id.description: The Id of the Certificate Dto

certificationDate.description: Date (chosen by the user for the granting of the certificate)

checkoutUrl.description: The URL to the Checkout Session

id.description: Unique identifier for the commission transfer.

currency.description: Currency in which the commission is transferred (e.g., "USD", "EUR").

baseAmount.description: The original amount from which the commission is derived.

subscriptionTier.description: Subscription tier of the subscription from which commission is created.

commissionPercentage.description: The commission percentage applied to the source amount.

clientTenantId.description: The unique identifier for the client associated with the commission transfer.

clientTenantName.description: The name of the client associated with the commission transfer.

partnerTenantId.description: The unique identifier for the partner associated with the commission transfer.

partnerTenantName.description: The name of the partner associated with the commission transfer.

stripeInvoiceId.description: Stripe Invoice ID that is source for the commission.

stripeInvoiceUrl.description: Stripe Invoice that is source for the commission.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the commission transfer was created.

id.description: Unique identifier for the commission transfer.

currency.description: Currency in which the commission is transferred (e.g., "USD", "EUR").

subscriptionTier.description: Subscription tier of the subscription from which commission is created.

commissionPercentage.description: The commission percentage applied to the source amount.

clientTenantId.description: The unique identifier for the client associated with the commission transfer.

clientTenantName.description: The name of the client associated with the commission transfer.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the commission transfer was created.

funnelId.description: Gets or sets the unique identifier for the funnel.

allVisits.description: Gets or sets the count of all visits to the funnel.

uniqueVisits.description:
Gets or sets the count of unique visits to the funnel.
This indicates the number of distinct visitors.

optIns.description:
Gets or sets the count of opt-ins collected from the funnel.
Indicate the number of users who have agreed to receive communications,
such as marketing materials, from the funnel.

funnelActivities.description: Gets or sets the list of funnel activities associated with the contact.

lastActivity.description: Gets or sets the timestamp of the last activity for the contact.

ContactActivityDto.description: Represents the activity of a contact.

createdAt.description: Date and time when contact was created.

meetingDate.description: The scheduled meeting date with the contact.

value.description: The monetary value associated with the contact.

items.description: The list of items in the current page.

pageIndex.description: The index of the current page.

itemsPerPage.description: The number of items per page.

hasPreviousPage.description: A boolean value indicating whether there's a previous page.

hasNextPage.description: A boolean value indicating whether there's a next page.

ContactDtoPaginatedListDto.description: Data transfer object for handling paginated lists of items.

funnelName.description: Gets or sets the name of the funnel associated with the contact.

funnelId.description: Represents the ID of the funnel associated with the contact.

events.description: Represents the activity data of a contact in a funnel.

ContactFunnelActivityDto.description: Represents the activity data of a contact in a funnel.

eventId.description: Represents the id of the event in the contact funnel activity.

stepName.description: Represents the name of a step in the contact funnel activity.

funnelStepId.description: Represents the identifier of a funnel step in the contact funnel activity event.

timestamp.description: Represents the timestamp of an event in the contact funnel activity.

ContactFunnelActivityEventDto.description: Represents an event in the contact funnel activity.

newLeads.description: Number of contacts with NewLead status.

inContact.description: Number of contacts with InContact status.

customers.description: Number of contacts with Customer status.

lost.description: Number of contacts with Lost status.

totalValue.description: Total value of all contacts for the tenant.

ContactPipelineStatsDto.description: Statistics for the contact pipeline overview.

ContactStatus.description: The status of a contact in the sales pipeline.

serviceName.description: The name of the service or application that is associated with, or responsible for creating this cookie.

privacyUrl.description: The web address (URL) that leads to the privacy policy relevant to this particular cookie.

expiration.description:
Represents the lifespan of the cookie. The unit of this value is determined by the "ExpirationType" property.
            
For example, if ExpirationType is set to "Day", then the Expiration value represents the number of days the cookie will last.

cookieName.description:
The specific name assigned to the cookie.
            
This is used to identify and distinguish it from other cookies.

domain.description:
The Internet domain that the cookie is associated with.
            
Typically, this is the website or web application that sets the cookie.

description.description:
Provides a detailed explanation of the cookie's purpose and its functionality.
            
This could include what data it collects, how that data is used, and so forth.
description.example: This cookie is used to maintain user sessions and authentication. It does not track or store personal data.

alpha2.description: Two letter ISO 3166 country code, e.g. DK. See all ISO 3166 Alpha 2 Country Codes

alpha3.description: Three letter ISO 3166 country code. See all ISO 3166 Alpha 3 Country Codes

numericCode.description: Numeric ISO 3166 country code. See all ISO 3166 Alpha 2 Country Codes

currency.description: Three-letter ISO currency code, in lowercase. If empty, defaults to dkk.

topicId.description: Gets or sets the ID of the topic associated with the support ticket.

severityId.description: Gets or sets the ID of the severity level associated with the support ticket.

title.description: Gets or sets the title of the support ticket.

description.description: Gets or sets the description of the support ticket.

notify.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to notify about the support ticket.

attachmentIds.description: Gets or sets the list of attachment IDs associated with the support ticket.

CreateSupportTicketDto.description: Data transfer object for creating a support ticket.

message.description: Gets or sets the content of the support ticket message.

CreateSupportTicketMessageDto.description: Data transfer object for a support ticket message.

tosAndPrivacyPolicyAccepted.description: A boolean value indicating whether the user has accepted the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.

url.description: The URL of the webhook where notifications will be sent.

events.description: The list of event names that the webhook is subscribed to.

funnelIds.description: ID's of funnels, if the webhook is specific to a list of funnels.

Currency.description: This class represents currency in the application.

contentCategory.description: Category of the content associated with the event.

contentIds.description: IDs of the content associated with the event, such as SKUs.

contentName.description: Name of the page or product associated with the event.

contentType.description: Type of the content associated with the event.

contents.description: A list of JSON objects containing product ids with associated event information.

currency.description: The currency for the "Purchase Events" as per ISO 4217 standard.

deliveryCategory.description: The type of delivery for "Purchase Events". Supported values are "in_store" and "curbside".

numberOfItems.description: The number of items that a user tries to buy during checkout. Used only with "InitiateCheckout" events.

orderId.description: Order Id associated with the event.

predictedLifeTimeValue.description: Predicted lifetime-value of a conversion event.

searchString.description: A search query made by a user. Used only with "Search" events.

status.description: Status of the registration event. Example: "registered". Used only with "CompleteRegistration" events.

value.description: Numeric value associated with this event. It could be a monetary value or a value within some other metric.

CustomData.description: Represents the custom data associated with a Facebook Conversion API event. This object can contain custom properties. Some properties are used exclusively with specific events.

name.description: Name of the private person or the company

attnPerson.description:
Name of the attn. person in case the customer is a company.
            
If customer is person this should be NULL.

vatNumber.description:
VAT number.
            
If customer is person this should be NULL.

newOptInsToday.description: The amount of new opt-ins today.

newOptInsYesterday.description: The amount of new opt-ins yesterday.

visitorsToday.description: The number of unique visitors today.

visitorsYesterday.description: The number of visitors from yesterday.

pageViewsToday.description: The total number of page views recorded today.

pageViewsYesterday.description: The number of page views yesterday.

newUsersToday.description: The amount of new users today.

newUsersYesterday.description: The amount of new users yesterday.

newOptInsToday.description: The amount of new opt-ins today.

newOptInsYesterday.description: The amount of new opt-ins yesterday.

newFunnelsToday.description: The amount of new funnels today.

newFunnelsYesterday.description: The amount of new funnels yesterday.

visitorsToday.description: The number of unique visitors today.

visitorsYesterday.description: The number of visitors from yesterday.

pageViewsToday.description: The total number of page views recorded today.

pageViewsYesterday.description: The number of page views yesterday.

id.description: The unique identifier of the user.

loggedInAt.description: Gets the date and time when the user logged in.

tenantId.description: Gets the unique identifier of the tenant to which the user belongs.

recentlyLoggedIn.description: Collection of users who have logged in recently

activityId.description: The id of the activity to delete.

eventType.description: The type of event of the activity.

isVerified.description: Value indicating whether the Domain is verified.

createdAt.description: Date and time the domain was added.

pageIndex.description: The index of the current page.

id.description: The Id of the email template.

name.description: The name of the email template.

html.description: The HTML version of the email body.

text.description: The text version of the email body.

language.description: The language in which the email is written.

availableVariables.description: The set of available variables that can be substituted into the email body.

EmailTemplate.description:
Represents an email template in the system, which includes HTML and Text versions of the email body,
the subject of the email, the language in which the email is written, and a set of available variables
that can be substituted into the email body.

token.description:
The token used to enable the authenticator.
            
The token is a 6 digit number.

contacts.description: List of Contact IDs representing the contacts to be exported.

funnelIds.description: The ids of the given funnels to export

tenants.description: List of Tenant IDs representing the tenants to be exported.

users.description: List of UserIds representing the users to be exported.

actionSource.description: The action source of the event.

eventName.description: The name of the event. This could be a standard or custom event.

eventTime.description: The time of the event as a Unix timestamp in seconds.

eventSourceUrl.description: The URL where the event happened. The URL must begin with http or https. This field is optional.

optOut.description: A flag indicating whether this event should be used for ads delivery optimization. This field is optional.

FacebookApiConversionEvent.description: Represents a Facebook API Conversion Event.

fileId.description: The Id of the file to be uploaded.

uploadUri.description:
The URI where the file has to be uploaded.
<remarks>Used to upload file.</remarks>

originalName.description: Original name of the file to be uploaded.

destinationUri.description:
Destination URI of the file.
<remarks>Used to get the file.</remarks>

email.description: The email address of the user whose password is to be reset.

assignedDomain.description: The default assigned domain used for funnel

assignedSubdomain.description: The default assigned subdomain used for funnel

redirectToCustomDomain.description: Indicates whether users should be redirected to custom domain when using assigned domain.

redirectRootToFirstStep.description: Indicates whether root "/" should be redirected to first step.

visitUrl.description: Url of the first funnelStep to visit

tenantId.description: The tenant the funnel is associated with.

trackingEnabled.description: Indicates whether tracking is enabled for the funnel.

gdprCompliant.description: Indicates whether the funnel complies with GDPR regulations.

createdAt.description: The date and time when the funnel was created.

updatedAt.description: The timestamp indicating the last time the funnel was updated.

items.description: The list of items in the current page.

pageIndex.description: The index of the current page.

itemsPerPage.description: The number of items per page.

hasPreviousPage.description: A boolean value indicating whether there's a previous page.

hasNextPage.description: A boolean value indicating whether there's a next page.

privacyPolicyUrl.description:
Gets or sets the URL of the privacy policy.
This URL directs users to the document outlining how personal data is collected,
used, and managed by the system.

privacyPolicyLabel.description:
Represents the label text associated with the privacy policy.
This property is used to display a user-friendly label
for the privacy policy in the user interface.

termsAndConditionsUrl.description:
Gets or sets the URL pointing to the Terms and Conditions document.
This URL provides users with access to the Terms and Conditions
related to the funnel, ensuring compliance with legal and regulatory requirements.

termsAndConditionsLabel.description:
Specifies the display label for terms and conditions.
This property is used to provide a user-friendly representation
for the terms and conditions.

cookiePolicyUrl.description:
Gets or sets the URL to the cookie policy associated with the GDPR consent.
This property should link to the specific cookie policy
that users can review to understand how cookies are used and managed.

cookiePolicyLabel.description: Represents the label associated with the cookie policy.

privacyConsentTitle.description: Gets or sets the title displayed in the privacy consent section.

privacyConsentDescription.description:
Specifies the descriptive text presented to a user regarding data privacy consent.
This description provides compliance-related information to ensure transparency and
informed user consent.

privacyConsentAcceptLabel.description: Represents the label for the "Accept" button or option in the privacy consent dialog.

privacyConsentRejectLabel.description: Represents the label for the "Reject" button or option in the privacy consent dialog.

privacyConsentResetLabel.description: Gets or sets the label used to reset privacy consent settings in the context of GDPR compliance.

currency.description: Three-letter ISO currency code for a supported currency.

The link to download the PDF for the invoice. If the invoice has not been finalized yet,
this will be null.

number.description:
A unique, identifying string that appears on emails sent to the customer for this
invoice. This starts with the customer's unique invoice_prefix if it is specified.

password.description: The password of the user trying to login.

serviceName.description: The name of the service or application that is associated with, or responsible for creating this cookie.

privacyUrl.description: The web address (URL) that leads to the privacy policy relevant to this particular cookie.

expiration.description:
Represents the lifespan of the cookie. The unit of this value is determined by the "ExpirationType" property.
            
For example, if ExpirationType is set to "Day", then the Expiration value represents the number of days the cookie will last.

cookieName.description:
The specific name assigned to the cookie.
            
This is used to identify and distinguish it from other cookies.

domain.description:
The Internet domain that the cookie is associated with.
            
Typically, this is the website or web application that sets the cookie.

description.description:
Provides a detailed explanation of the cookie's purpose and its functionality.
            
This could include what data it collects, how that data is used, and so forth.
description.example: This cookie is used to maintain user sessions and authentication. It does not track or store personal data.

Page.description:
Represents a page in the system. A page includes an identifier, language, name, source (Src), description,
and metadata for SEO purposes (meta title, description, and keywords).

pageIndex.description: The index of the current page.

itemsPerPage.description: The number of items per page.

pending.description: List of accounts with pending funds

value.description: The performance value for a specific value

tierId.description: Unique identifier for the pricing tier.

features.description: List of features available in this pricing tier.

externalReference.description: External reference which is used to link this tier to Stripe.

currency.description:
Currency of the price.
Three-letter ISO currency code, in lowercase.

amount.description: Gets or sets the amount of the price.

period.description:
Gets or sets the period for the price.
The frequency at which a subscription is billed. One of day, week, month or year.

externalReference.description: External reference for the tier pricing.

validFrom.description: The date the Privacy Policy is valid from. This is used to determine which Privacy Policy is active.

content.description: The HTML content of the Privacy Policy, that is the actual text of the Privacy Policy.

PrivacyPolicy.description:
The PrivacyPolicy entity represents a privacy policy, that is a document that explains how an organization handles
any customer, client or employee information gathered in its operations. This includes how the information is
collected, used, stored and destroyed.

Phone number of the user, should include only country, area code, and number.
This property requires SHA256 and UTF-8 hashing.

gender.description: User's gender in lowercase. It can either be "f" or "m". This property requires SHA256 and UTF-8 hashing.

dateOfBirth.description: User's date of birth, in the format of YYYYMMDD. This property requires SHA256 and UTF-8 hashing.

lastName.description: User's last name in lowercase. This property requires SHA256 and UTF-8 hashing.

firstName.description: User's first name in lowercase. This property requires SHA256 and UTF-8 hashing.

city.description: Name of the city in lowercase without spaces or punctuation. This property requires SHA256 and UTF-8 hashing.

state.description: A two-letter state code in lowercase. Example: ca. This property requires SHA256 and UTF-8 hashing.

zip.description: Postal code, varies as per the country's standards. This property requires SHA256 and UTF-8 hashing.

country.description: Two-letter country code. Example: dk. This property requires SHA256 and UTF-8 hashing.

externalId.description: External advertisement Id associated with the user. Although not required, hashing is recommended.

clientIpAddress.description:
IP address of the browser corresponding to the event. This property is required.
123.123.123.123 can be used for testing environment!

clientUserAgent.description: User agent for the browser corresponding to the event. This property is required.
clientUserAgent.example: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64; rv:78.0) Gecko/20100101 Firefox/78.0

facebookClick.description: The click id value of the Facebook click. This property should not be hashed.

facebookPixel.description: The pixel id value of the Facebook pixel. This property should not be hashed.

subscriptionId.description: The subscription id for the user in this transaction. This property should not be hashed.

leadId.description: The id associated with a lead generated by Facebook's Lead Ads. This property should not be hashed.

fbLoginId.description: The id issued by Facebook when a person first logs into an instance of an app, also known as an App-Scoped ID. This property should not be hashed.

UserData.description: Represents the user data required by the Facebook Conversion API. Contains optional and required properties, some of which need SHA256 and UTF-8 hashing.

email.description: The email address of the user.

emailConfirmed.description: A boolean value indicating whether the user's email has been confirmed.

isActive.description: A boolean value indicating whether the user is active.

deactivatedByAdmin.description: A boolean value indicating whether the user was deactivated by an admin.

roles.description: A list of the user's roles.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the user was created.

loggedInAt.description: The timestamp when the user was last logged in.

tenantId.description: The Id of the tenant the user is associated with.

twoFactorEnabled.description: A boolean value indicating whether the user has two-factor authentication enabled.

tosAndPrivacyPolicyAccepted.description: Whether the user has accepted the terms of service and privacy policy.

items.description: The list of items in the current page.

pageIndex.description: The index of the current page.

itemsPerPage.description: The number of items per page.

hasPreviousPage.description: A boolean value indicating whether there's a previous page.

hasNextPage.description: A boolean value indicating whether there's a next page.

UserDtoPaginatedListDto.description: Data transfer object for handling paginated lists of items.

id.description: Unique identifier of the user event

params.description: Parameters associated with the user event

triggeredById.description: Unique identifier of the user who triggered the event

triggeredAt.description: Date and time when event was fired

itemsPerPage.description: The number of items per page.

hasNextPage.description: A boolean value indicating whether there's a next page.

email.description: Email address associated with the user invitation

createdAt.description: Date and time when the user invitation was created

updatedAt.description: Date and time when the user invitation was last updated

expiresAt.description: Expiration date and time of the token

lastSentAt.description: Date and time when the user invitation was sent

UserInviteStatus.description: The status of a user invite.

id.description: The Id of the opt in.

name.description: Name of the user used to opt in.

phoneNumber.description: Phone number used to opt in.

funnelName.description: Name of the Funnel to opt in.

itemsPerPage.description: The number of items per page.

hasNextPage.description: A boolean value indicating whether there's a next page.

userId.description: The userId of the user to be verified.

funnels.description: The id for funnel connected to the webhook.

secret.description: The secret used to sign the webhook.

enabled.description: Determines if the webhook is enabled.

tenantId.description: The id for the Tenant connected to the webhook.

id.description: The Id of the website template.

name.description: The Name of the website template.

description.description:
The Description of the Website Template.
Includes details about the site's theme, layout, or other identifying characteristics.

previewImage.description:
The Preview Image for the Website Template.
Screenshot representing how the template looks when deployed.

categories.description: List of categories for the Website Template.

content.description: The Liquid HTML content of WebsiteTemplate

availableVariables.description: The set of available variables that can be substituted into the template body

additionalDisplayInfo.description: Additional display information for specific Value to display on FE

category.description:
Group in which should the input field be added.
Ex. Tracking, Content

ZapierHookPayload.description: This is the payload to send to Zapier hooks. Contains the contact's email and name.

createdAt.description: The date and time when the opt-in was created.

contactId.description: Unique identifier for the contact associated with the opt-in.

funnelId.description: Identifier of the funnel associated with the opt-in.

funnelStepId.description: Identifier for the specific step in the funnel associated with the opt-in

funnelIds.description: List of funnels to filter by. Can be empty

funnelStepIds.description: List of funnel steps to filter by. Can be empty

Bearer.description:
JWT Authorization header using the Bearer scheme.
Enter 'Bearer' [space] and then your token in the text input below.
Example: 'Bearer 12345abcdef'
Bearer.name: Authorization

ApiKey.description: API Key authentication. Enter your API key in the field below.
ApiKey.name: X-API-KEY
